evals.prompt: validate my docs against the code
evals.expected_output: Should identify all inconsistencies between documentation files (CLAUDE.md, README.md, etc.) and source-of-truth files (Dockerfile, test.nu, toolkit README), then fix them. Should NOT flag changelog entries about past renames.

evals.prompt: I just renamed a bunch of things in the Dockerfile. Can you check if the docs are still accurate?
evals.expected_output: Should cross-reference Dockerfile tool/package lists and paths against all docs, find any stale references from the rename, and fix them.

evals.prompt: check if README.md and CLAUDE.md are consistent with each other and with the Dockerfile
evals.expected_output: Should compare claims across README.md, CLAUDE.md, and Dockerfile. Find mismatches in tool lists, paths, commands, and module names. Fix the docs to match the Dockerfile (source of truth).
